integrity-hair.title: Integrity Hair
integrity-hair.notes: Intimate home-based salon (Nikki), Waterfall. Budget/low-maintenance journal angle. Home salon = thin photo footprint; using stock with disclosure.
caveats: Home-based — few indexed photos; client to supply real gallery

charlies-hair-salon.title: Charlie's Hair Salon
charlies-hair-salon.notes: Homely, pampering (tea + cupcakes + head massage), Waterfall. Pampering/wellbeing journal. 1 real Fresha photo used.
charlies-hair-salon.nextAction: Confirm owner (Charlie vs Anne) before pitching
